description_long: This house features a long, rectangular footprint with a prominent flat roof that extends well beyond the main structure, resembling a modernist or minimalist design. The building is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with a large, horizontal overhang that could serve as a carport or covered walkway. The facade includes a mix of solid walls and window openings, with the main entrance set back beneath the overhang. The structure appears to be single-story, with a compact, geometric layout and minimal decorative elements. Windows are arranged in a functional, asymmetrical pattern, providing natural light to different sections of the house. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, emphasizing clean lines and open space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a long, horizontal overhang, featuring light-colored walls and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long overhang extending across the facade, with the main entrance and some window openings visible beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the overhang and the compact, rectangular shape of the house, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the house, with the overhang stretching across the entire width and additional window or door features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the flat roof and the extended overhang, with a clear view of the house's geometric proportions.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath a wide overhang, minimalistic door, no visible porch or decorative columns
